hero_sub: No commission, no platform that owns your students. Your profile, your reviews, your history — forever yours.
hero_note: Works in browser · No install required
problem_stat_label: taken by existing platforms per lesson
problem_text: Preply, Italki and others take a cut from every lesson. Your profile, students, and reviews belong to them — not you. They can change the rules, suspend your account, or shut down, and you lose everything.
steps_tutors: Get your personal key — your identity on the platform.
Add subjects, price, schedule, and a short bio.
Your profile appears in the catalog — students send requests.
Confirm the booking and conduct the lesson.
Rate students, keep notes, publish blog posts.
steps_students: Sign up and get your personal key.
Filter by subject, language, and price.
Reserve a free time from the tutor's schedule.
Messages are end-to-end protected — no one else can read them.
One review per completed lesson — no fake ratings possible.
Lesson history stays with you, always.
features: Platform doesn't handle payments — you agree on payment directly.
No central server can delete or suspend you.
Profile, schedule, messages — all cryptographically signed by you.
Messages and lesson notes are protected.
Opens in browser, installs on phone as a PWA.
One review per completed lesson — no fake ratings.
audience: Tutors who want to stop giving 20% of their income to a middleman.
Students who want to work with tutors without unnecessary intermediaries.
Anyone who doesn't want a corporation owning their learning history.
missing: Video calls and in-app payments — for now use Zoom/Skype and bank transfers.
Native mobile app — the site works on phone as a regular app in the meantime.
cta_title: Your account. Your students. Your rules.
cta_sub: Join Tutor Hub — a platform that works for you, not against you.
faq_desc: We're putting together answers to the most common questions. Check back soon.
about_desc: The story behind Tutor Hub and the principles that guide it.
footer_note: Built on Nostr · Open protocol · No ads
